title: xanthophyllum pseudoadenotus
intro: Xanthophyllum pseudoadenotus is a plant species belonging to the family Polygalaceae, commonly known as the milkwort family. Traditionally, Xanthophyllum pseudoadenotus is used in various herbal remedies for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as wound healing, reducing fever, and treating respiratory issues. Xanthophyllum pseudoadenotus is often prepared as a decoction or infusion in herbal medicine, and its extracts are also used in various traditional treatments.
